_meta.title: Mysteries of the World: The Scion Companion
_meta.role: Supplement integration — Cults, Druid Path, Covenant Birthright, purview creation, Teros sample pantheon, and translation chapter remain PDF-first; MotW pantheon patrons, virtues, and Signature Purviews (Nemeton, Asha) are in pantheons.json / virtues.json / purviews.json.

pathsCallout: Companion rules for Cult Birthrights, Druid Path knacks, and Covenant are in the PDF. Pantheon Path Asset Skills for Loa, Nemetondevos, and Yazata are applied when you pick those pantheons.
heroPurviewsCallout: Signature Purviews Nemeton (Nemetondevos) and Asha (Yazata) are in purviews.json for sheet tracking; full Boon ladders are in Mysteries of the World.
virtuesNote: Virtues for MotW pantheons live in data/virtues.json under keys loa, nemetondevos, and yazata.
